footer.description: The ultimate destination for slang learning and PK battles. Master internet slang while having fun!

about.title: About SlangHome
about.subtitle: A community of language enthusiasts preserving and celebrating slang culture worldwide

story.p1: SlangHome was born from a simple idea: slang is more than just informal language—it's a living, breathing reflection of culture, generation, and identity. Yet much of this rich linguistic heritage goes undocumented and risks being lost over time.
story.p2: We are a group of language enthusiasts, cultural researchers, and curious minds who came together with a shared passion: to document, preserve, and celebrate the colorful world of slang across all languages and cultures.
story.p3: From street talk to internet memes, from regional dialects to generational expressions, we believe every piece of slang tells a story worth preserving. SlangHome is our way of ensuring these stories live on.

diversity.title: Cultural Diversity
diversity.desc: We celebrate slang from every corner of the world, recognizing that each language and culture brings unique expressions worth preserving.

community.title: Community First
community.desc: SlangHome is built by the community, for the community. Every contribution helps us create a more comprehensive resource.

quality.title: Quality Content
quality.desc: We strive for accuracy and depth, providing not just definitions but the cultural context and evolution behind each expression.

preservation.title: Cultural Preservation
preservation.desc: We document slang before it disappears, creating an archive that future generations can explore and learn from.

do.item1: Collect and document slang from languages around the world
do.item2: Trace the evolution and cultural origins of expressions
do.item3: Build a community where language lovers can share and learn
do.item4: Preserve linguistic heritage for future generations

about.joinUsDesc: Whether you're a language learner, cultural enthusiast, or just curious about slang, you're welcome here.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions and get support

faq.a1: SlangHome is a community-driven platform for discovering, learning, and sharing slang from languages around the world. We aim to preserve and celebrate the colorful diversity of informal language.
faq.a2: You can submit new slang entries through our contribution page. Each submission is reviewed by our moderators to ensure quality and accuracy before being published.
faq.a3: We support slang from many languages including English, Chinese, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and more. We're constantly expanding our language coverage.
faq.q4: How do I become a moderator?
faq.a4: You can apply to become a moderator through our feedback page. We look for active community members who are passionate about language and culture.
faq.a5: Yes, SlangHome is completely free to use. You can browse, search, and learn slang without any cost. Creating an account gives you additional features like favorites and contributions.

guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
guidelines.subtitle: Help us maintain a welcoming and respectful community for everyone

respect.title: Be Respectful
respect.desc: Treat all community members with respect. Personal attacks, harassment, or discriminatory language will not be tolerated.

accuracy.title: Be Accurate
accuracy.desc: When contributing slang, provide accurate definitions, examples, and cultural context. Misinformation harms the community.

community.title: Support the Community
community.desc: Help fellow members learn and grow. Share knowledge, provide constructive feedback, and celebrate our diverse languages.

reporting.title: Report Issues
reporting.desc: If you see content that violates our guidelines, please report it. This helps us maintain a safe and welcoming environment.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Content
prohibited.desc: Hate speech, explicit content, spam, and copyrighted material without permission are strictly prohibited.

guidelines.questionsDesc: If you have any questions about our community guidelines, please reach out to us.

what.title: What Are Cookies
what.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our site.

usage.title: How We Use Cookies
usage.content: We use cookies for the following purposes:

items.essential: Essential: Cookies necessary for the website to function
items.performance: Performance: Cookies that help us understand how visitors use our site
items.functional: Functional: Cookies that remember your choices and preferences
items.targeting: Targeting: Cookies used to deliver relevant advertisements

session.title: Session Cookies
session.content: These cookies are temporary and are deleted when you close your browser.

persistent.title: Persistent Cookies
persistent.content: These cookies remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them.

firstParty.title: First-Party Cookies
firstParty.content: These cookies are set by our website directly.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.content: These cookies are set by third-party services that appear on our pages.

management.title: Managing Cookies
management.content: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. You can delete all cookies that are already on your computer and you can set most browsers to prevent them from being placed.

items.browser: Use your browser settings to control cookies

updates.title: Updates to This Policy
updates.content: We may update this cookie policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for operational, legal, or regulatory reasons.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at:

consent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze site usage, and enable social media features. By continuing to use our site, you agree to our

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Slang Master ('we', 'our', or 'us') respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you about how we look after your personal data when you visit our website and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together follows:

items.personal: Personal Information: name, email address, username
items.usage: Usage Data: information about how you use our website
items.technical: Technical Data: IP address, browser type, time zone
items.cookies: Cookie Data: information collected through cookies

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances:

items.service: To provide and maintain our service
items.improvement: To improve and optimize our website
items.communication: To communicate with you about updates and offers
items.security: To detect and prevent fraud and security issues

sharing.title: Disclosure of Your Information
sharing.content: We may share your personal data with the parties set out below:

items.service: Service providers who provide services on our behalf
items.legal: Legal authorities when required by law
items.business: Third parties in connection with a business sale

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorized way, altered or disclosed. In addition, we limit access to your personal data to those employees, agents, contractors and other third parties who have a business need to know.

rights.title: Your Legal Rights
rights.content: Under certain circumstances, you have rights under data protection laws in relation to your personal data, including the right to:

items.access: Request access to your personal data
items.correct: Request correction of your personal data
items.delete: Request deletion of your personal data
items.export: Request export of your personal data
items.object: Object to processing of your personal data

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: You can set your browser to refuse all or some browser cookies, or to alert you when websites set or access cookies. If you disable or refuse cookies, please note that some parts of this website may become inaccessible or not function properly. For more information, please see our

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: Our website is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If we learn we have collected personal data from a child under 13, we will delete that information immediately.

changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update our privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new privacy policy on this page and updating the 'Last Updated' date at the top of this privacy policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:

agreement.title: Agreement to Terms
agreement.content: By accessing or using Slang Master, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.

account.title: User Accounts
account.content: To access certain features of the service, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for:

items.security: Maintaining the security of your account
items.responsibility: All activities that occur under your account
items.age: Being at least 13 years old to use this service

conduct.title: User Conduct
conduct.content: You agree not to use the service to:

items.infringe: Infringe on others' intellectual property rights
items.interfere: Interfere with the operation of the service
items.unauthorized: Attempt unauthorized access to the service

content.title: User Content
content.ownership: You retain ownership of content you submit to the service. However, by submitting content, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, and display that content.
content.license: Your license to us includes the right to:

items.responsibility: You are responsible for your content
items.rights: You have the right to grant this license
items.removal: We may remove content that violates these terms

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: The service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by Slang Master and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: The service is provided on an 'AS IS' and 'AS AVAILABLE' basis, without any warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall Slang Master be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses.

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Slang Master from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses arising out of your use of the service or your violation of these terms.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach these terms.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Slang Master operates, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes by posting the new terms on this page.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: For any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:

hero.title: Explore Global Slang, Connect with Diverse Cultures
hero.subtitle: Discover fascinating slang from every corner of the world. From street talk to internet memes, trace how words evolve across cultures and generations. Join our community to learn, share, and celebrate the colorful diversity of human expression.

subscribe.title: SlangHome Series
subscribe.subtitle: Annual, Internet Culture, and Dialect series
